title: Atlas Elite
description: This adds a bunch of cool stuff that I want in minecraft :)
body:
This mod adds a bunch of stuff that i want in Minecraft.

- Just enough items is recommended!

### Q&A
- Will this mod will not be ported to forge or neoforge?    
No.
  
- Why was it moved to 1.20.1   
Because this version of minecraft isn't as cluttered and 1.21
and some good mods are on this version.
  
Any questions, feel free to ask in my discord!
- Betas Avalible Here [CLICK ME](https://ko-fi.com/addi3dabaddie)
